title: Instructions for Practical Living
description: Wang Yangming's revolutionary teaching: knowledge and action are one; the innate moral knowledge (liangzhi) of the heart-mind is sufficient.
introduction: Wang Yangming's revolutionary teaching: knowledge and action are one; the innate moral knowledge (liangzhi) of the heart-mind is sufficient.

translation.text: Knowledge and action are originally one. To know and not to act is not yet to know.
